productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Leather Black Wallet
description: Style NoteCrafted from leather, this glossy black wallet from united colors of benetton is fabulously stylish and well organised. This two-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. These wallets are creatively engineered to cater to the urban male. Make a style statement effortlessly and with lots of space for all your monetary essentials this wallet makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas two main compartmentsThree credit card slots with two slip pockets and a see through id card pocketBrand logo embossed on the front with stitch detailingMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11.5 cm x 9.5 cm
